case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. LORI L. FARR et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, LORI L. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD SERVED SEP-23-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, LORI L.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, LORI L.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $304.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, LORI L.
